summary: Verified role-based attendance editing system. All 10 backend API tests pass: Admin does NOT auto-get teacher-only permissions (record_attendance, take_attendance, manage_lectures, edit_attendance), PUT /api/attendance/{id}/status correctly returns 403 when user lacks edit_attendance permission. Frontend code review confirms courses.tsx hides 'محاضرات اليوم' for admin and course-students.tsx shows edit button only for users with edit_attendance.
critical_code_review_comments: Code review PASSED: server.py lines 413-423 correctly checks TEACHER_ONLY_PERMISSIONS for admin users
Code review PASSED: AuthContext.tsx lines 167-196 mirrors backend TEACHER_ONLY_PERMISSIONS logic
Code review PASSED: courses.tsx line 228 shows 'محاضرات اليوم' only for role === 'teacher'
Code review PASSED: course-students.tsx lines 700-709 shows edit attendance button only for hasEditAttendancePerm users

success_rate.frontend: Code review complete - UI implementation matches requirements

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test attendance record 69a756aac63c5ee8fa454c9c
context_for_next_testing_agent: Role-based attendance editing fully verified via backend API tests. Key test: TestAdminPermissions::test_admin_cannot_edit_attendance_without_permission confirms PUT /api/attendance/{id}/status returns 403 for admin without edit_attendance. Frontend uses hasPermission(PERMISSIONS.EDIT_ATTENDANCE) to show/hide edit buttons.

verified_features.backend_attendance_403: PASSED - PUT /api/attendance/{id}/status returns 403 when user lacks edit_attendance permission
verified_features.backend_attendance_200: PASSED - Endpoint works when user has explicit edit_attendance permission
verified_features.admin_no_teacher_perms: PASSED - Admin login response does NOT include record_attendance, take_attendance, manage_lectures, edit_attendance
verified_features.dean_has_edit_attendance: PASSED - Dean role lookup via /api/roles shows appropriate permissions
verified_features.frontend_courses_today_section: CODE_REVIEW_PASSED - Line 228 in courses.tsx: {user?.role === 'teacher' && (...)} hides section for admin
verified_features.frontend_edit_button: CODE_REVIEW_PASSED - Line 202 hasEditAttendancePerm = hasPermission(PERMISSIONS.EDIT_ATTENDANCE) controls button visibility

permissions_system.enforcement: Backend has_permission() and Frontend hasPermission() both check TEACHER_ONLY_PERMISSIONS for admin role
